notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes visible events (Fang Yuan kills Chen Chi, impersonates him, kills Chen Lizhi) that are already known to the reader/player as they happen. No private knowledge, future-known information, or secret motives/plans are directly supported by the source pointers. The only potential hidden fact would be Fang Yuan's plan to kill Chen Wanyun (mentioned in relations), but the source pointers only contain the quote '立杀陈婉芸！' which is a spoken line from Chen Le, not narrator-level confirmation of a secret plan. The seed does not provide direct source-backed evidence of who knows or doesn't know this plan as a hidden fact.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes actions (方源 kills 陈尺, disguises as him, kills 陈立志) but does not provide direct source text for character motives. Observed behaviors are clear but inferred motives would require psychological leaps beyond one-step cautious inference. For example, 方源's actions could be for stealth infiltration, eliminating threats, or advancing a larger plan - the seed does not directly support any single motive. Returning empty characterMotives as per rules.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed focuses on individual actions by Fang Yuan (disguised as Chen Chi) killing Chen Lizhi and planning to kill Chen Wanyun. Chen Chi's family/clan is mentioned (Chen Lizhi, Chen Le, Chen Wanyun as descendants) but the seed does not establish a collective faction/group pressure dynamic. The events are individual assassinations by a disguised impostor, not a collective stake or pressure on a named family/clan as a group. No named collective actor (family, clan, faction) is shown reacting or having a stake beyond individual members being killed. Chen Chi himself is dead. The 'Chen family' is implied but not explicitly named as a collective actor with stakes in the seed facts.
IF export filter quarantined 4 legacy old-schema branches.
